title: Smart Cities, Sustainable Future
theme: Urban innovation, sustainability, and civic life in the Gulf
grammarPoint1: Present Simple vs Present Continuous (review and extend)
grammarPoint2: Comparatives and superlatives for describing cities
objectives: Talk about smart-city features in clear B1 English
Compare traditional and modern urban solutions respectfully
Use target vocabulary of technology and sustainability
Complete a short reading and listening task about city life
Plan a simple awareness poster for a local sustainability campaign
